2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the product description section
3. SQL injection vulnerability in the search functionality
4. Lack of proper encryption for sensitive data, such as payment information and user accounts
5. Insufficient input validation and sanitization in various forms across the website
6. Unsecure storage of passwords in plaintext or weak hashing algorithm
7. No protection against CSRF attacks on critical functions like password reset
8. Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in the cart and checkout pages
9. Use of outdated and vulnerable
